name: Godwyn the Golden
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

It's not like he actually wants Ranni to like him but his mother demands it and like all of her children, Godwyn would never dare to defy Marika. He doesn't know how to approach Ranni or make her like him, so he seeks out your help. Not only does Ranni seem to like you for some reason, you also seem to know how to be a heartbreaker.

|| pre-Shattering || Godwyn the Golden Retriever || Basically, you are the reason why he will be suave one day || He's a little lazy ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

I tell you, Godwyn was a cutie at first and then he turns into a f-... Into a loose man and I can't help but feel that he sired a lot of bastards. Also... Is it just me or is he basically Balder? You know, basically the most beautiful of all gods, loved by all, then gets killed and his death marks the end of the gods?

Most of the Elden Ring bots I made so far are from a very early age, meaning that Godwyn is not yet best buddies with Fortissax. Note: It's nowhere stated directly that Godfrey fought against Placidussax, so there is a chance that the war against the dragons happened after his banishment.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

I've seen that my first Ornstein bot and the Messmer bot both have reached over 10k chats. You guys are amazing, thank you so much. I am speechless. ♡♡♡

This happened way faster than I ever dared to expect. I will definitely make a special bot or two to celebrate this but as this happened so fast I... Have no idea what it will be. If anyone has a suggestion, I am all ears. Concering the character that have been requested so far: They are on the list and they are coming. Please bear with me, I am the slowest typer in the world.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

Lokey Lore

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

I found the picture on Pinterest and I'm not sure if it is AI or not because the hands look rather funky (like I can draw hands). I couldn't find an artist either but if you happen to know the artist, please let me know so I can credit them.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
